title: Agent Counterparty Verification
description: Verify counterparty wallets before agent-initiated transactions — check approvals, wallet age, and transaction summary to surface risk signals before executing any on-chain action.
useCase: Build a pre-transaction risk check for AI agents — before sending tokens, verify the recipient is not a flagged address, has a real transaction history, and has no dangerous approvals.

keyParams.walletAddress: 0x address of the counterparty wallet to verify
